conbody.p: Overview: The Reviews by Highest Rank report helps to analyze productivity of CDSs. The report displays the count of encounters that have initial review date and a highest rank assigned.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE Triage CDE Triage Dashboard Reviews by Highest Rank

The Reviews By Highest Rank report displays the following:
Summary Card: Total Reviews
Reviews by Highest Rank Chart
% Reviewed by CDS Chart
Encounter details tabular Chart

p.b: Reviews by Highest Rank - Summary Card

ul.li: The Summary Card at the top right corner of the Reviews by Highest Rank report displays total review count done by CDSs between the selected date range.

p.b: Reviews by Highest Rank - Reviews by Highest Rank Chart

ul.li: In the Reviews by Highest Rank section, X-axis indicates the Highest Rank of encounter in CDS Triage, and Y-axis indicates the count of the encounter.
Encounters that do not have any Highest Rank assigned are displayed under No Rank category.

p.b: Reviews by Highest Rank - % Reviewed by CDS Chart

ul.li: In the % Reviews by CDS section, X-axis indicates the % of reviews done by each CDS, and Y-axis indicates the name of the CDS assigned to the encounter in CDS Triage.
Encounters that do not have any CDS assigned are displayed under the Unassigned CDS category on the Y-axis.
